# Syscall 合规性规则提取报告

## 结论

本次分析了 accept、accept4、acct、add_key、adjtimex、bind、bpf、brk、cachestat、capget、capset、chdir、chroot、clock_adjtime、clock_getres、clock_gettime、clock_nanosleep、clock_settime、clone、clone3、close、close_range、connect、copy_file_range、delete_module、dup、dup3、epoll_create1、epoll_ctl、epoll_pwait、epoll_pwait2、eventfd2、execve、execveat、exit、exit_group、faccessat、faccessat2、fadvise64、fallocate、fanotify_init、fanotify_mark、fchdir、fchmod、fchmodat、fchmodat2、fchown、fchownat、fcntl、fdatasync、fgetxattr、finit_module、flistxattr、flock、fremovexattr、fsconfig、fsetxattr、fsmount、fsopen、fspick、fstat、fstatfs、fsync、ftruncate、futex、futex_requeue、futex_wait、futex_waitv、futex_wake、get_mempolicy、get_robust_list、getcpu、getcwd、getdents64、getegid、geteuid、getgid、getgroups、getitimer、getpeername、getpgid、getpid、getppid、getpriority、getrandom、getresgid、getresuid、getrlimit、getrusage、getsid、getsockname、getsockopt、gettid、gettimeofday、getuid、getxattr、init_module、inotify_add_watch、inotify_init1、inotify_rm_watch、io_cancel、io_destroy、io_getevents、io_pgetevents、io_setup、io_submit、io_uring_enter、io_uring_register、io_uring_setup、ioctl、ioprio_get、ioprio_set、kcmp、kexec_file_load、kexec_load、keyctl、kill、landlock_add_rule、landlock_create_ruleset、landlock_restrict_self、lgetxattr、linkat、listen、listmount、listxattr、llistxattr、lookup_dcookie、lremovexattr、lseek、lsetxattr、lsm_get_self_attr、lsm_list_modules、lsm_set_self_attr、madvise、map_shadow_stack、mbind、membarrier、memfd_create、memfd_secret、migrate_pages、mincore、mkdirat、mknodat、mlock、mlock2、mlockall、mmap、mount、mount_setattr、move_mount、move_pages、mprotect、mq_getsetattr、mq_notify、mq_open、mq_timedreceive、mq_timedsend、mq_unlink、mremap、mseal、msgctl、msgget、msgrcv、msgsnd、msync、munlock、munlockall、munmap、name_to_handle_at、nanosleep、newfstatat、nfsservctl、open_by_handle_at、open_tree、openat、openat2、perf_event_open、personality、pidfd_getfd、pidfd_open、pidfd_send_signal、pipe2、pivot_root、pkey_alloc、pkey_free、pkey_mprotect、ppoll、prctl、pread64、preadv、preadv2、prlimit64、process_madvise、process_mrelease、process_vm_readv、process_vm_writev、pselect6、ptrace、pwrite64、pwritev、pwritev2、quotactl、quotactl_fd、read、readahead、readlinkat、readv、reboot、recvfrom、recvmmsg、recvmsg、remap_file_pages、removexattr、renameat2、request_key、restart_syscall、riscv_flush_icache、riscv_hwprobe、rseq、rt_sigaction、rt_sigpending、rt_sigprocmask、rt_sigqueueinfo、rt_sigreturn、rt_sigsuspend、rt_sigtimedwait、rt_tgsigqueueinfo、sched_get_priority_max、sched_get_priority_min、sched_getaffinity、sched_getattr、sched_getparam、sched_getscheduler、sched_rr_get_interval、sched_setaffinity、sched_setattr、sched_setparam、sched_setscheduler、sched_yield、seccomp、semctl、semget、semop、semtimedop、sendfile、sendmmsg、sendmsg、sendto、set_mempolicy、set_mempolicy_home_node、set_robust_list、set_tid_address、setdomainname、setfsgid、setfsuid、setgid、setgroups、sethostname、setitimer、setns、setpgid、setpriority、setregid、setresgid、setresuid、setreuid、setrlimit、setsid、setsockopt、settimeofday、setuid、setxattr、shmat、shmctl、shmdt、shmget、shutdown、sigaltstack、signalfd4、socket、socketpair、splice、statfs、statmount、statx、swapoff、swapon、symlinkat、sync、sync_file_range、syncfs、sysinfo、syslog、tee、tgkill、timer_create、timer_delete、timer_getoverrun、timer_gettime、timer_settime、timerfd_create、timerfd_gettime、timerfd_settime、times、tkill、truncate、umask、umount2、uname、unlinkat、unshare、userfaultfd、utimensat、vhangup、vmsplice、wait4、waitid、write、writev，发现 2320 条可执行的合规性规则。

## `accept`

共形成 15 条规则：

| 规则 | 条件 | 检查内容 | 预期结果 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`MAN_07C18A1F5C6914D1--07c18a1f5c69`](../../library/rules/man-07c18a1f5c6914d1-07c18a1f5c69.yaml) | or EWOULDBLOCK The socket is marked nonblocking and no connections are present to be accepted. POSIX.1-2001 and POSIX.1-2008 allow either error to be... | 调用 accept(sockfd, addr, addrlen) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EAGAIN |
| [`MAN_0AE9F6A19729C7D2--0ae9f6a19729`](../../library/rules/man-0ae9f6a19729c7d2-0ae9f6a19729.yaml) | sockfd is not an open file descriptor | 调用 accept(sockfd, addr, addrlen) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EBADF |
| [`MAN_142A30F5EBF7CCE1--142a30f5ebf7`](../../library/rules/man-142a30f5ebf7cce1-142a30f5ebf7.yaml) | The system call was interrupted by a signal that was caught before a valid connection arrived; see signal (7) | 调用 accept(sockfd, addr, addrlen) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINTR |
| [`MAN_2B5A35D041B6CDCB--2b5a35d041b6`](../../library/rules/man-2b5a35d041b6cdcb-2b5a35d041b6.yaml) | The per-process limit on the number of open file descriptors has been reached | 调用 accept(sockfd, addr, addrlen) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EMFILE |
| [`MAN_4DFD8732F88C4CAC--4dfd8732f88c`](../../library/rules/man-4dfd8732f88c4cac-4dfd8732f88c.yaml) | Socket is not listening for connections, or addrlen is invalid (e.g., is negative) | 调用 accept(sockfd, addr, addrlen) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_663B3C3EEB98245D--663b3c3eeb98`](../../library/rules/man-663b3c3eeb98245d-663b3c3eeb98.yaml) | The referenced socket is not of type SOCK_STREAM | 调用 accept(sockfd, addr, addrlen) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EOPNOTSUPP |
| [`MAN_91422D4DBF7854C3--91422d4dbf78`](../../library/rules/man-91422d4dbf7854c3-91422d4dbf78.yaml) | The file descriptor sockfd does not refer to a socket | 调用 accept(sockfd, addr, addrlen) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOTSOCK |
| [`MAN_95AE27469C0D0FB0--95ae27469c0d`](../../library/rules/man-95ae27469c0d0fb0-95ae27469c0d.yaml) | The addr argument is not in a writable part of the user address space | 调用 accept(sockfd, addr, addrlen) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EFAULT |
| [`MAN_98A629AF2556600E--98a629af2556`](../../library/rules/man-98a629af2556600e-98a629af2556.yaml) | The syscall completes successfully. | 调用 accept(sockfd, addr, addrlen) | {'kind': 'return_fd', 'return': 'FD'} |
| [`MAN_9CC26FBE27A0B0D1--9cc26fbe27a0`](../../library/rules/man-9cc26fbe27a0b0d1-9cc26fbe27a0.yaml) | A connection has been aborted | 调用 accept(sockfd, addr, addrlen) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ECONNABORTED |
| [`MAN_AD651DC28E22F8A2--ad651dc28e22`](../../library/rules/man-ad651dc28e22f8a2-ad651dc28e22.yaml) | Firewall rules forbid connection | 调用 accept(sockfd, addr, addrlen) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EPERM |
| [`MAN_B7505628CCA74CC9--b7505628cca7`](../../library/rules/man-b7505628cca74cc9-b7505628cca7.yaml) | The documented ENOBUFS condition applies. | 调用 accept(sockfd, addr, addrlen) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOBUFS |
| [`MAN_C81F46F598B15888--c81f46f598b1`](../../library/rules/man-c81f46f598b15888-c81f46f598b1.yaml) | Not enough free memory. This often means that the memory allocation is limited by the socket buffer limits, not by the system memory | 调用 accept(sockfd, addr, addrlen) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOMEM |
| [`MAN_E5F3CF8AD505B08F--e5f3cf8ad505`](../../library/rules/man-e5f3cf8ad505b08f-e5f3cf8ad505.yaml) | Protocol error. In addition, network errors for the new socket and as defined for the protocol may be returned. Various Linux kernels can return other... | 调用 accept(sockfd, addr, addrlen) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EPROTO |
| [`MAN_E72ED462D13F9D26--e72ed462d13f`](../../library/rules/man-e72ed462d13f9d26-e72ed462d13f.yaml) | The system-wide limit on the total number of open files has been reached | 调用 accept(sockfd, addr, addrlen) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENFILE |

## `acct`

共形成 15 条规则：

| 规则 | 条件 | 检查内容 | 预期结果 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`MAN_025048B2C8FABCB8`](../../library/rules/man-025048b2c8fabcb8.yaml) | Too many symbolic links were encountered in resolving path | 调用 acct(path) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ELOOP |
| [`MAN_091DF0CC098B42B6`](../../library/rules/man-091df0cc098b42b6.yaml) | The system-wide limit on the total number of open files has been reached | 调用 acct(path) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENFILE |
| [`MAN_368FAB2C80DB889C`](../../library/rules/man-368fab2c80db889c.yaml) | path refers to a file on a read-only filesystem | 调用 acct(path) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EROFS |
| [`MAN_3F3AF210F0AD54A3`](../../library/rules/man-3f3af210f0ad54a3.yaml) | Write permission is denied for the specified file, or search permission is denied for one of the directories in the path prefix of path (see also... | 调用 acct(path) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EACCES |
| [`MAN_5D182F7654922DE8`](../../library/rules/man-5d182f7654922de8.yaml) | BSD process accounting has not been enabled when the operating system kernel was compiled. The kernel configuration parameter controlling this feature is... | 调用 acct(path) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOSYS |
| [`MAN_7154A5BC5C11D7BF`](../../library/rules/man-7154a5bc5c11d7bf.yaml) | The syscall completes successfully. | 调用 acct(path) | 调用成功，返回 0 |
| [`MAN_921EEBD96B62E18A`](../../library/rules/man-921eebd96b62e18a.yaml) | There are no more free file structures or we ran out of memory | 调用 acct(path) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EUSERS |
| [`MAN_93C1F96D342A3502`](../../library/rules/man-93c1f96d342a3502.yaml) | path points outside your accessible address space | 调用 acct(path) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EFAULT |
| [`MAN_95E4D0042A8E60AF`](../../library/rules/man-95e4d0042a8e60af.yaml) | Error writing to the file path | 调用 acct(path) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EIO |
| [`MAN_A95D8DE641D5242B`](../../library/rules/man-a95d8de641d5242b.yaml) | The calling process has insufficient privilege to enable process accounting. On Linux, the CAP_SYS_PACCT capability is required | 调用 acct(path) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EPERM |
| [`MAN_AC29B19E10FB71E2`](../../library/rules/man-ac29b19e10fb71e2.yaml) | Out of memory | 调用 acct(path) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOMEM |
| [`MAN_CFFCD69DBABD472E`](../../library/rules/man-cffcd69dbabd472e.yaml) | The specified path does not exist | 调用 acct(path) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOENT |
| [`MAN_E54016783724646E`](../../library/rules/man-e54016783724646e.yaml) | A component used as a directory in path is not in fact a directory | 调用 acct(path) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOTDIR |
| [`MAN_EBE7AF4E472D91CC`](../../library/rules/man-ebe7af4e472d91cc.yaml) | path was too long | 调用 acct(path) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENAMETOOLONG |
| [`MAN_EE618629A4B85EB0`](../../library/rules/man-ee618629a4b85eb0.yaml) | path is a directory | 调用 acct(path) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EISDIR |

| 规则 | 条件 | 检查内容 | 预期结果 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`MAN_02841D256D8D8D75`](../../library/rules/man-02841d256d8d8d75.yaml) | Insufficient memory to create a key | 调用 add_key(type, description, size, size, keyring) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOMEM |
| [`MAN_2A61F58E0C932730`](../../library/rules/man-2a61f58e0c932730.yaml) | The keyring has expired | 调用 add_key(type, description, size, size, keyring) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EKEYEXPIRED |
| [`MAN_494FCD586E2D5DC3`](../../library/rules/man-494fcd586e2d5dc3.yaml) | The keyring has been revoked | 调用 add_key(type, description, size, size, keyring) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EKEYREVOKED |
| [`MAN_4CF3810093BB6432`](../../library/rules/man-4cf3810093bb6432.yaml) | The type started with a period ( . ). Key types that begin with a period are reserved to the implementation | 调用 add_key(type, description, size, size, keyring) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EPERM |
| [`MAN_6D92BC0478903471`](../../library/rules/man-6d92bc0478903471.yaml) | The keyring doesn't exist | 调用 add_key(type, description, size, size, keyring) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOKEY |
| [`MAN_6E94A46DD3E9F446`](../../library/rules/man-6e94a46dd3e9f446.yaml) | The keyring wasn't available for modification by the user | 调用 add_key(type, description, size, size, keyring) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EACCES |
| [`MAN_730B8378FA7368D1`](../../library/rules/man-730b8378fa7368d1.yaml) | The size of the string (including the terminating null byte) specified in type or description exceeded the limit (32 bytes and 4096 bytes respectively) | 调用 add_key(type, description, size, size, keyring) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_9C167BA5F188F234`](../../library/rules/man-9c167ba5f188f234.yaml) | type was keyring and the description started with a period ( . ). Keyrings with descriptions (names) that begin with a period are reserved to the implementation | 调用 add_key(type, description, size, size, keyring) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EPERM |
| [`MAN_AE9B7D3358ABF2B1`](../../library/rules/man-ae9b7d3358abf2b1.yaml) | The payload data was invalid | 调用 add_key(type, description, size, size, keyring) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_F69FBCA0F4DD28C3`](../../library/rules/man-f69fbca0f4dd28c3.yaml) | One or more of type , description , and payload points outside process's accessible address space | 调用 add_key(type, description, size, size, keyring) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EFAULT |
| [`MAN_F88CAC488E125E7E`](../../library/rules/man-f88cac488e125e7e.yaml) | type was logon and the description was not qualified with a prefix string of the form service: | 调用 add_key(type, description, size, size, keyring) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_FC5FA989550135DA`](../../library/rules/man-fc5fa989550135da.yaml) | The key quota for this user would be exceeded by creating this key or linking it to the keyring | 调用 add_key(type, description, size, size, keyring) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EDQUOT |

## `bind`

共形成 17 条规则：

| 规则 | 条件 | 检查内容 | 预期结果 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`MAN_0AA82EE1C8565C78`](../../library/rules/man-0aa82ee1c8565c78.yaml) | sockfd is not a valid file descriptor | 调用 bind(sockfd, addr, addrlen) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EBADF |
| [`MAN_2883CA6859B011D4`](../../library/rules/man-2883ca6859b011d4.yaml) | addrlen is wrong, or addr is not a valid address for this socket's domain | 调用 bind(sockfd, addr, addrlen) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_36E0856D3BABB7C2`](../../library/rules/man-36e0856d3babb7c2.yaml) | addr is too long | 调用 bind(sockfd, addr, addrlen) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENAMETOOLONG |

| [`MAN_E107BAB8F5012718`](../../library/rules/man-e107bab8f5012718.yaml) | For BPF_PROG_LOAD , indicates an attempt to load an invalid program. eBPF programs can be deemed invalid due to unrecognized instructions, the use of... | 调用 bpf(cmd, attr, size) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |

| [`MAN_8267DBA7430B2DCB`](../../library/rules/man-8267dba7430b2dcb.yaml) | ( clock_settime ()): tp.tv_sec is negative or tp.tv_nsec is outside the range [0, 999,999,999] | 调用 clock_settime(clockid, tp) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_926273F22D577E3A`](../../library/rules/man-926273f22d577e3a.yaml) | The clockid specified in a call to clock_settime () is not a settable clock | 调用 clock_settime(clockid, tp) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_B35DF8C645BF0365`](../../library/rules/man-b35df8c645bf0365.yaml) | The hot-pluggable device (like USB for example) represented by a dynamic clk_id has disappeared after its character device was opened | 调用 clock_settime(clockid, tp) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENODEV |

| [`MAN_F69F6987AD4215C0`](../../library/rules/man-f69f6987ad4215c0.yaml) | clock_settime () does not have permission to set the clock indicated | 调用 clock_settime(clockid, tp) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EPERM |

| [`MAN_CE0BCF8762F46A62`](../../library/rules/man-ce0bcf8762f46a62.yaml) | The syscall completes successfully. | 调用 epoll_create1(flags) | {'kind': 'return_fd', 'return': 'FD'} |
| [`MAN_E686ADFB7B643BFF`](../../library/rules/man-e686adfb7b643bff.yaml) | The per-process limit on the number of open file descriptors has been reached | 调用 epoll_create1(flags) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EMFILE |
## `epoll_ctl`

共形成 12 条规则：

| 规则 | 条件 | 检查内容 | 预期结果 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`MAN_1D94CC28DA4FE0E2`](../../library/rules/man-1d94cc28da4fe0e2.yaml) | An invalid event type was specified along with EPOLLEXCLUSIVE in events | 调用 epoll_ctl(epfd, op, fd, event) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_39443E26E24B6F4B`](../../library/rules/man-39443e26e24b6f4b.yaml) | op was EPOLL_CTL_MOD and the EPOLLEXCLUSIVE flag has previously been applied to this epfd , fd pair | 调用 epoll_ctl(epfd, op, fd, event) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_463AA50F45210CB8`](../../library/rules/man-463aa50f45210cb8.yaml) | op was EPOLL_CTL_MOD or EPOLL_CTL_DEL , and fd is not registered with this epoll instance | 调用 epoll_ctl(epfd, op, fd, event) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOENT |
| [`MAN_51680AEE1B98DFEC`](../../library/rules/man-51680aee1b98dfec.yaml) | The limit imposed by /proc/sys/fs/epoll/max_user_watches was encountered while trying to register ( EPOLL_CTL_ADD ) a new file descriptor on an epoll... | 调用 epoll_ctl(epfd, op, fd, event) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOSPC |
| [`MAN_8089CCB3310B7306`](../../library/rules/man-8089ccb3310b7306.yaml) | EPOLLEXCLUSIVE was specified in event and fd refers to an epoll instance | 调用 epoll_ctl(epfd, op, fd, event) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_838355DDB1BE708E`](../../library/rules/man-838355ddb1be708e.yaml) | op was EPOLL_CTL_ADD , and the supplied file descriptor fd is already registered with this epoll instance | 调用 epoll_ctl(epfd, op, fd, event) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EEXIST |
| [`MAN_BE9A7AEBFB53C64A`](../../library/rules/man-be9a7aebfb53c64a.yaml) | There was insufficient memory to handle the requested op control operation | 调用 epoll_ctl(epfd, op, fd, event) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOMEM |
| [`MAN_CDD195853C6DFE14`](../../library/rules/man-cdd195853c6dfe14.yaml) | fd refers to an epoll instance and this EPOLL_CTL_ADD operation would result in a circular loop of epoll instances monitoring one another or a nesting depth... | 调用 epoll_ctl(epfd, op, fd, event) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ELOOP |
| [`MAN_DADCFA23F461FBBF`](../../library/rules/man-dadcfa23f461fbbf.yaml) | epfd is not an epoll file descriptor, or fd is the same as epfd , or the requested operation op is not supported by this interface | 调用 epoll_ctl(epfd, op, fd, event) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_E32B6349055FCEF9`](../../library/rules/man-e32b6349055fcef9.yaml) | epfd or fd is not a valid file descriptor | 调用 epoll_ctl(epfd, op, fd, event) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EBADF |
| [`MAN_F02261D5F2501D56`](../../library/rules/man-f02261d5f2501d56.yaml) | op was EPOLL_CTL_MOD and events included EPOLLEXCLUSIVE | 调用 epoll_ctl(epfd, op, fd, event) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_F101B1F166BED529`](../../library/rules/man-f101b1f166bed529.yaml) | The target file fd does not support epoll . This error can occur if fd refers to, for example, a regular file or a directory | 调用 epoll_ctl(epfd, op, fd, event) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EPERM |

| 规则 | 条件 | 检查内容 | 预期结果 |

| [`MAN_E88777B03615ACD8--e88777b03615`](../../library/rules/man-e88777b03615acd8-e88777b03615.yaml) | The memory area pointed to by events is not accessible with write permissions | 调用 epoll_pwait(epfd, n, n, timeout, sigmask) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EFAULT |

| 规则 | 条件 | 检查内容 | 预期结果 |

| [`MAN_2482F6894B14F49D`](../../library/rules/man-2482f6894b14f49d.yaml) | (since Linux 3.1) Having changed its real UID using one of the set*uid () calls, the caller was and is now still above its RLIMIT_NPROC resource limit (see... | 调用 execve(path, argv, envp) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EAGAIN |
| [`MAN_29D5D1F7FC85EB60`](../../library/rules/man-29d5d1f7fc85eb60.yaml) | The file or a script interpreter is not a regular file | 调用 execve(path, argv, envp) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EACCES |
| [`MAN_498F75E57971ACE2`](../../library/rules/man-498f75e57971ace2.yaml) | An ELF interpreter was a directory | 调用 execve(path, argv, envp) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EISDIR |
| [`MAN_535FF69FBDF6D1BA`](../../library/rules/man-535ff69fbdf6d1ba.yaml) | The total number of bytes in the environment ( envp ) and argument list ( argv ) is too large, an argument or environment string is too long, or the full... | 调用 execve(path, argv, envp) | 返回 -1，errno 为 E2BIG |
| [`MAN_584FB17A96BB2519`](../../library/rules/man-584fb17a96bb2519.yaml) | An executable is not in a recognized format, is for the wrong architecture, or has some other format error that means it cannot be executed | 调用 execve(path, argv, envp) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOEXEC |
| [`MAN_5A74077EE86F077B`](../../library/rules/man-5a74077ee86f077b.yaml) | A capability-dumb applications would not obtain the full set of permitted capabilities granted by the executable file. See capabilities (7) | 调用 execve(path, argv, envp) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EPERM |
| [`MAN_611DBAEAF25BEBA0`](../../library/rules/man-611dbaeaf25beba0.yaml) | The filesystem is mounted nosuid , the user is not the superuser, and the file has the set-user-ID or set-group-ID bit set | 调用 execve(path, argv, envp) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EPERM |
| [`MAN_667D4B2CC64A44F2`](../../library/rules/man-667d4b2cc64a44f2.yaml) | An ELF interpreter was not in a recognized format | 调用 execve(path, argv, envp) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ELIBBAD |
| [`MAN_73878C0ED3F6B7C5`](../../library/rules/man-73878c0ed3f6b7c5.yaml) | An ELF executable had more than one PT_INTERP segment (i.e., tried to name more than one interpreter) | 调用 execve(path, argv, envp) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_86F55F465483D85E`](../../library/rules/man-86f55f465483d85e.yaml) | Search permission is denied on a component of the path prefix of path or the name of a script interpreter. (See also path_resolution (7).) | 调用 execve(path, argv, envp) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EACCES |
| [`MAN_89D33AB929D9531F`](../../library/rules/man-89d33ab929d9531f.yaml) | The specified executable was open for writing by one or more processes | 调用 execve(path, argv, envp) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ETXTBSY |
| [`MAN_98B0BE7D9A11DFBB`](../../library/rules/man-98b0be7d9a11dfbb.yaml) | The process is being traced, the user is not the superuser and the file has the set-user-ID or set-group-ID bit set | 调用 execve(path, argv, envp) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EPERM |
| [`MAN_9FD391343E0DB6C0`](../../library/rules/man-9fd391343e0db6c0.yaml) | path or a script or ELF interpreter does not exist | 调用 execve(path, argv, envp) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOENT |
| [`MAN_ADCC2407A0C9100B`](../../library/rules/man-adcc2407a0c9100b.yaml) | path or one of the pointers in the vectors argv or envp points outside your accessible address space | 调用 execve(path, argv, envp) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EFAULT |
| [`MAN_C24BA0B8438C9710`](../../library/rules/man-c24ba0b8438c9710.yaml) | A component of the path prefix of path or a script or ELF interpreter is not a directory | 调用 execve(path, argv, envp) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOTDIR |
| [`MAN_CBCECA39A48FAB37`](../../library/rules/man-cbceca39a48fab37.yaml) | Execute permission is denied for the file or a script or ELF interpreter | 调用 execve(path, argv, envp) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EACCES |
| [`MAN_DA34EB9987996A2D`](../../library/rules/man-da34eb9987996a2d.yaml) | The system-wide limit on the total number of open files has been reached | 调用 execve(path, argv, envp) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENFILE |
| [`MAN_DBCF419F762F0AD2`](../../library/rules/man-dbcf419f762f0ad2.yaml) | The maximum recursion limit was reached during recursive script interpretation (see Interpreter scripts, above). Before Linux 3.8, the error produced for... | 调用 execve(path, argv, envp) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ELOOP |
| [`MAN_DC7F71A57922E283`](../../library/rules/man-dc7f71a57922e283.yaml) | The filesystem is mounted noexec | 调用 execve(path, argv, envp) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EACCES |
| [`MAN_E6410AAE89E74298`](../../library/rules/man-e6410aae89e74298.yaml) | An I/O error occurred | 调用 execve(path, argv, envp) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EIO |
| [`MAN_EF4B69DF86EFA0C3`](../../library/rules/man-ef4b69df86efa0c3.yaml) | Insufficient kernel memory was available | 调用 execve(path, argv, envp) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOMEM |
| [`MAN_F6DF482A3E9DD764`](../../library/rules/man-f6df482a3e9dd764.yaml) | Too many symbolic links were encountered in resolving path or the name of a script or ELF interpreter | 调用 execve(path, argv, envp) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ELOOP |

| [`MAN_F66662B26012AD7D`](../../library/rules/man-f66662b26012ad7d.yaml) | Insufficient kernel memory was available | 调用 faccessat2(dirfd, path, mode, flags) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOMEM |

| [`MAN_35D31F1448242454`](../../library/rules/man-35d31f1448242454.yaml) | There is not enough space left on the device containing the file referred to by fd | 调用 fallocate(fd, mode, offset, size) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOSPC |

| [`MAN_51804F262D65C7D9`](../../library/rules/man-51804f262d65c7d9.yaml) | offset + size exceeds the maximum file size | 调用 fallocate(fd, mode, offset, size) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EFBIG |

| [`MAN_7C9D4B4F49A0C203`](../../library/rules/man-7c9d4b4f49a0c203.yaml) | The system-wide limit on the total number of open files has been reached | 调用 inotify_init1(flags) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENFILE |
| [`MAN_C467D6702AB64674`](../../library/rules/man-c467d6702ab64674.yaml) | The syscall completes successfully. | 调用 inotify_init1(flags) | {'kind': 'return_fd', 'return': 'FD'} |
| [`MAN_C73955E76383C54B`](../../library/rules/man-c73955e76383c54b.yaml) | The user limit on the total number of inotify instances has been reached | 调用 inotify_init1(flags) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EMFILE |

| 规则 | 条件 | 检查内容 | 预期结果 |

| [`MAN_375FDFA41BD9112B`](../../library/rules/man-375fdfa41bd9112b.yaml) | Insufficient space for the creation of a new message queue. This probably occurred because the queues_max limit was encountered; see mq_overview (7) | 调用 mq_open(name, oflag) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOSPC |
| [`MAN_7A48D8239BDA60B4`](../../library/rules/man-7a48d8239bda60b4.yaml) | O_CREAT was specified in oflag , and attr was not NULL, but attr->mq_maxmsg or attr->mq_msqsize was invalid. Both of these fields must be greater than zero.... | 调用 mq_open(name, oflag) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_7B6A4FB3DB08583D`](../../library/rules/man-7b6a4fb3db08583d.yaml) | name contained more than one slash | 调用 mq_open(name, oflag) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EACCES |
| [`MAN_9BDD1022EAC68DED`](../../library/rules/man-9bdd1022eac68ded.yaml) | name was too long | 调用 mq_open(name, oflag) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENAMETOOLONG |
| [`MAN_AD4D4A5F416F9F5A`](../../library/rules/man-ad4d4a5f416f9f5a.yaml) | The queue exists, but the caller does not have permission to open it in the specified mode | 调用 mq_open(name, oflag) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EACCES |
| [`MAN_BE4A1F7A2F5140EB`](../../library/rules/man-be4a1f7a2f5140eb.yaml) | The O_CREAT flag was not specified in oflag , and no queue with this name exists | 调用 mq_open(name, oflag) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOENT |
| [`MAN_DCD266C6F6F1F4C9`](../../library/rules/man-dcd266c6f6f1f4c9.yaml) | The system-wide limit on the total number of open files and message queues has been reached | 调用 mq_open(name, oflag) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENFILE |
| [`MAN_F2B410276719C5DD`](../../library/rules/man-f2b410276719c5dd.yaml) | name doesn't follow the format in mq_overview (7) | 调用 mq_open(name, oflag) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_FDDB2B5934441468`](../../library/rules/man-fddb2b5934441468.yaml) | The per-process limit on the number of open file and message queue descriptors has been reached (see the description of RLIMIT_NOFILE in getrlimit (2)) | 调用 mq_open(name, oflag) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EMFILE |

| [`MAN_F90EC9931B98DCBF--f90ec9931b98`](../../library/rules/man-f90ec9931b98dcbf-f90ec9931b98.yaml) | (since Linux 3.8) Both MSG_COPY and IPC_NOWAIT were specified in msgflg , and this kernel was configured without CONFIG_CHECKPOINT_RESTORE | 调用 msgrcv(msqid, msgsz, msgsz, msgtyp, msgflg) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOSYS |

共形成 17 条规则：

| 规则 | 条件 | 检查内容 | 预期结果 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`MAN_0985C968EEE2B273`](../../library/rules/man-0985c968eee2b273.yaml) | IPC_NOWAIT and MSG_COPY were specified in msgflg and the queue contains fewer than msgtyp messages | 调用 msgsnd(msqid, msgsz, msgsz, msgflg) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOMSG |
| [`MAN_0F286F1FE274A8E9`](../../library/rules/man-0f286f1fe274a8e9.yaml) | Sleeping on a full message queue condition, the process caught a signal | 调用 msgsnd(msqid, msgsz, msgsz, msgflg) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINTR |
| [`MAN_14A8EDF7140CC212`](../../library/rules/man-14a8edf7140cc212.yaml) | While the process was sleeping to receive a message, the process caught a signal; see signal (7) | 调用 msgsnd(msqid, msgsz, msgsz, msgflg) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINTR |
| [`MAN_202EF9D1C280FD44`](../../library/rules/man-202ef9d1c280fd44.yaml) | (since Linux 3.14) msgflg specified MSG_COPY , but not IPC_NOWAIT | 调用 msgsnd(msqid, msgsz, msgsz, msgflg) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_210B5A9910A7CEA9`](../../library/rules/man-210b5a9910a7cea9.yaml) | The message queue was removed | 调用 msgsnd(msqid, msgsz, msgsz, msgflg) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EIDRM |
| [`MAN_26AA0D7BE44FBCDD`](../../library/rules/man-26aa0d7be44fbcdd.yaml) | (since Linux 3.14) msgflg specified both MSG_COPY and MSG_EXCEPT | 调用 msgsnd(msqid, msgsz, msgsz, msgflg) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_2F9873D60115A72F`](../../library/rules/man-2f9873d60115a72f.yaml) | msqid was invalid, or msgsz was less than 0 | 调用 msgsnd(msqid, msgsz, msgsz, msgflg) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_30905429C2E54ECD`](../../library/rules/man-30905429c2e54ecd.yaml) | The address pointed to by msgp isn't accessible | 调用 msgsnd(msqid, msgsz, msgsz, msgflg) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EFAULT |
| [`MAN_41C9898038029FC7`](../../library/rules/man-41c9898038029fc7.yaml) | The message text length is greater than msgsz and MSG_NOERROR isn't specified in msgflg | 调用 msgsnd(msqid, msgsz, msgsz, msgflg) | 返回 -1，errno 为 E2BIG |
| [`MAN_527A0D84E9FF86AB`](../../library/rules/man-527a0d84e9ff86ab.yaml) | Invalid msqid value, or nonpositive mtype value, or invalid msgsz value (less than 0 or greater than the system value MSGMAX ) | 调用 msgsnd(msqid, msgsz, msgsz, msgflg) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_5DB99587335B243D`](../../library/rules/man-5db99587335b243d.yaml) | The syscall completes successfully. | 调用 msgsnd(msqid, msgsz, msgsz, msgflg) | {'kind': 'return_value', 'return': '0'} |
| [`MAN_6B07B6E4CA20325F`](../../library/rules/man-6b07b6e4ca20325f.yaml) | The message can't be sent due to the msg_qbytes limit for the queue and IPC_NOWAIT was specified in msgflg | 调用 msgsnd(msqid, msgsz, msgsz, msgflg) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EAGAIN |
| [`MAN_869D25DD5A735F5D`](../../library/rules/man-869d25dd5a735f5d.yaml) | IPC_NOWAIT was specified in msgflg and no message of the requested type existed on the message queue | 调用 msgsnd(msqid, msgsz, msgsz, msgflg) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOMSG |
| [`MAN_94C6721D75F7461E`](../../library/rules/man-94c6721d75f7461e.yaml) | The calling process does not have read permission on the message queue, and does not have the CAP_IPC_OWNER capability in the user namespace that governs... | 调用 msgsnd(msqid, msgsz, msgsz, msgflg) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EACCES |
| [`MAN_9536A31C78C4468C`](../../library/rules/man-9536a31c78c4468c.yaml) | While the process was sleeping to receive a message, the message queue was removed | 调用 msgsnd(msqid, msgsz, msgsz, msgflg) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EIDRM |
| [`MAN_B821196BEABAEB30`](../../library/rules/man-b821196beabaeb30.yaml) | The calling process does not have write permission on the message queue, and does not have the CAP_IPC_OWNER capability in the user namespace that governs... | 调用 msgsnd(msqid, msgsz, msgsz, msgflg) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EACCES |
| [`MAN_F90EC9931B98DCBF`](../../library/rules/man-f90ec9931b98dcbf.yaml) | (since Linux 3.8) Both MSG_COPY and IPC_NOWAIT were specified in msgflg , and this kernel was configured without CONFIG_CHECKPOINT_RESTORE | 调用 msgsnd(msqid, msgsz, msgsz, msgflg) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOSYS |

| [`MAN_D913B6C6A8F45EE6`](../../library/rules/man-d913b6c6a8f45ee6.yaml) | path is an empty string and AT_EMPTY_PATH was not specified in flags | 调用 newfstatat(dirfd, path, statbuf, flags) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOENT |
| [`MAN_DD35836D94E4B623`](../../library/rules/man-dd35836d94e4b623.yaml) | Too many symbolic links encountered while traversing the path | 调用 newfstatat(dirfd, path, statbuf, flags) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ELOOP |

| [`MAN_ED275A56443D1C45`](../../library/rules/man-ed275a56443d1c45.yaml) | Out of memory (i.e., kernel memory) | 调用 newfstatat(dirfd, path, statbuf, flags) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOMEM |

## `openat2`

共形成 12 条规则：

| 规则 | 条件 | 检查内容 | 预期结果 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`MAN_08038D4021D9C0AA`](../../library/rules/man-08038d4021d9c0aa.yaml) | how.resolve contains RESOLVE_NO_SYMLINKS , and one of the path components was a symbolic link (or magic link) | 调用 openat2(dirfd, path, how, size) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ELOOP |

| [`MAN_0B67057F4DF5AD34`](../../library/rules/man-0b67057f4df5ad34.yaml) | An unknown flag or invalid value was specified in how | 调用 openat2(dirfd, path, how, size) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_0C00158F30B4ACC1`](../../library/rules/man-0c00158f30b4acc1.yaml) | RESOLVE_CACHED was set, and the open operation cannot be performed using only cached information. The caller should retry without RESOLVE_CACHED set in... | 调用 openat2(dirfd, path, how, size) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EAGAIN |
| [`MAN_20D644B5C57002F8`](../../library/rules/man-20d644b5c57002f8.yaml) | An extension that this kernel does not support was specified in how . (See the Extensibility section of NOTES for more detail on how extensions are handled.) | 调用 openat2(dirfd, path, how, size) | 返回 -1，errno 为 E2BIG |
| [`MAN_212E61F50AFDF2FB`](../../library/rules/man-212e61f50afdf2fb.yaml) | how.resolve contains either RESOLVE_IN_ROOT or RESOLVE_BENEATH , and the kernel could not ensure that a .. component didn't escape (due to a race condition... | 调用 openat2(dirfd, path, how, size) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EAGAIN |
| [`MAN_22B16FF99BAA88E5`](../../library/rules/man-22b16ff99baa88e5.yaml) | how.resolve contains RESOLVE_NO_XDEV , and a path component crosses a mount point | 调用 openat2(dirfd, path, how, size) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EXDEV |
| [`MAN_25CD94348F7360E1`](../../library/rules/man-25cd94348f7360e1.yaml) | size was smaller than any known version of struct open_how | 调用 openat2(dirfd, path, how, size) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_34D46B3AA947FA44`](../../library/rules/man-34d46b3aa947fa44.yaml) | how.resolve contains either RESOLVE_IN_ROOT or RESOLVE_BENEATH , and an escape from the root during path resolution was detected | 调用 openat2(dirfd, path, how, size) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EXDEV |
| [`MAN_9B95D3E42B4918C6`](../../library/rules/man-9b95d3e42b4918c6.yaml) | The syscall completes successfully. | 调用 openat2(dirfd, path, how, size) | {'kind': 'return_fd', 'return': 'FD'} |
| [`MAN_A68CC55C5764955D`](../../library/rules/man-a68cc55c5764955d.yaml) | how.resolve contains RESOLVE_NO_MAGICLINKS , and one of the path components was a magic link | 调用 openat2(dirfd, path, how, size) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ELOOP |
| [`MAN_BDE63EEF419087CB`](../../library/rules/man-bde63eef419087cb.yaml) | how.flags contains OPENAT2_REGULAR flag and the path is not a regular file | 调用 openat2(dirfd, path, how, size) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EFTYPE |

| 规则 | 条件 | 检查内容 | 预期结果 |

| [`MAN_2A34A09D80EA6D8E`](../../library/rules/man-2a34a09d80ea6d8e.yaml) | pidfd is not a valid PID file descriptor | 调用 pidfd_getfd(pidfd, targetfd, flags) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EBADF |
| [`MAN_393CA866FF9D6CED`](../../library/rules/man-393ca866ff9d6ced.yaml) | The system-wide limit on the total number of open files has been reached | 调用 pidfd_getfd(pidfd, targetfd, flags) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENFILE |
| [`MAN_5437E540CEE5B02D`](../../library/rules/man-5437e540cee5b02d.yaml) | The syscall completes successfully. | 调用 pidfd_getfd(pidfd, targetfd, flags) | {'kind': 'return_fd', 'return': 'FD'} |
| [`MAN_58936D050A8879DE`](../../library/rules/man-58936d050a8879de.yaml) | flags is not 0 | 调用 pidfd_getfd(pidfd, targetfd, flags) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_E1E951578D046183`](../../library/rules/man-e1e951578d046183.yaml) | targetfd is not an open file descriptor in the process referred to by pidfd | 调用 pidfd_getfd(pidfd, targetfd, flags) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EBADF |
| [`MAN_E31C74C54288401E`](../../library/rules/man-e31c74c54288401e.yaml) | The process referred to by pidfd does not exist (i.e., it has terminated and been waited on) | 调用 pidfd_getfd(pidfd, targetfd, flags) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ESRCH |

| [`MAN_B75BC21DDFF7D484`](../../library/rules/man-b75bc21ddff7d484.yaml) | The call was interrupted by a signal before any data was read; see signal (7) | 调用 read(fd, count, count) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINTR |

| [`MAN_AD9A71FB720F3F16`](../../library/rules/man-ad9a71fb720f3f16.yaml) | or EACCES The directory containing oldpath has the sticky bit ( S_ISVTX ) set and the process's effective user ID is neither the user ID of the file to be... | 调用 renameat2(olddirfd, oldpath, newdirfd, newpath, flags) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EPERM |
| [`MAN_AE759265E8EFB39C`](../../library/rules/man-ae759265e8efb39c.yaml) | oldpath already has the maximum number of links to it, or it was a directory and the directory containing newpath has the maximum number of links | 调用 renameat2(olddirfd, oldpath, newdirfd, newpath, flags) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EMLINK |
| [`MAN_AF87083AF942513B`](../../library/rules/man-af87083af942513b.yaml) | The filesystem does not support one of the flags in flags | 调用 renameat2(olddirfd, oldpath, newdirfd, newpath, flags) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_B4A1F34DFF24820E`](../../library/rules/man-b4a1f34dff24820e.yaml) | The rename fails because oldpath or newpath is a directory that is in use by some process (perhaps as current working directory, or as root directory, or... | 调用 renameat2(olddirfd, oldpath, newdirfd, newpath, flags) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EBUSY |
| [`MAN_BC71D974F2E7DC73`](../../library/rules/man-bc71d974f2e7dc73.yaml) | The device containing the file has no room for the new directory entry | 调用 renameat2(olddirfd, oldpath, newdirfd, newpath, flags) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOSPC |
| [`MAN_D52BB21217EFD80E`](../../library/rules/man-d52bb21217efd80e.yaml) | Both RENAME_NOREPLACE and RENAME_EXCHANGE were specified in flags | 调用 renameat2(olddirfd, oldpath, newdirfd, newpath, flags) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_F11483CF295E52A4`](../../library/rules/man-f11483cf295e52a4.yaml) | A component used as a directory in oldpath or newpath is not, in fact, a directory. Or, oldpath is a directory, and newpath exists but is not a directory | 调用 renameat2(olddirfd, oldpath, newdirfd, newpath, flags) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOTDIR |
| [`MAN_F759FA01CCD924D3`](../../library/rules/man-f759fa01ccd924d3.yaml) | oldpath ( newpath ) is relative but olddirfd ( newdirfd ) is not a valid file descriptor | 调用 renameat2(olddirfd, oldpath, newdirfd, newpath, flags) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EBADF |
| [`MAN_FFF96CB16310BF3A`](../../library/rules/man-fff96cb16310bf3a.yaml) | Too many symbolic links were encountered in resolving oldpath or newpath | 调用 renameat2(olddirfd, oldpath, newdirfd, newpath, flags) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ELOOP |
## `request_key`

共形成 12 条规则：

| 规则 | 条件 | 检查内容 | 预期结果 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`MAN_1322BFB37B59679D`](../../library/rules/man-1322bfb37b59679d.yaml) | The attempt to generate a new key was rejected | 调用 request_key(type, description, callout_info, dest_keyring) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EKEYREJECTED |
| [`MAN_13EBCA9DECC049A9`](../../library/rules/man-13ebca9decc049a9.yaml) | Insufficient memory to create a key | 调用 request_key(type, description, callout_info, dest_keyring) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOMEM |
| [`MAN_3BF6BE1B805173A3`](../../library/rules/man-3bf6be1b805173a3.yaml) | The keyring wasn't available for modification by the user | 调用 request_key(type, description, callout_info, dest_keyring) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EACCES |
| [`MAN_66B86283526DC70D`](../../library/rules/man-66b86283526dc70d.yaml) | A revoked key was found, but no replacement could be obtained | 调用 request_key(type, description, callout_info, dest_keyring) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EKEYREVOKED |
| [`MAN_6F3DE0D8F0C45D11`](../../library/rules/man-6f3de0d8f0c45d11.yaml) | The size of the string (including the terminating null byte) specified in type or description exceeded the limit (32 bytes and 4096 bytes respectively) | 调用 request_key(type, description, callout_info, dest_keyring) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_9507A0BFA121CBD7`](../../library/rules/man-9507a0bfa121cbd7.yaml) | The request was interrupted by a signal; see signal (7) | 调用 request_key(type, description, callout_info, dest_keyring) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINTR |
| [`MAN_9E2263041F8B8CF7`](../../library/rules/man-9e2263041f8b8cf7.yaml) | One of type , description , or callout_info points outside the process's accessible address space | 调用 request_key(type, description, callout_info, dest_keyring) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EFAULT |
| [`MAN_C1B7540CF853BA57`](../../library/rules/man-c1b7540cf853ba57.yaml) | The size of the string (including the terminating null byte) specified in callout_info exceeded the system page size | 调用 request_key(type, description, callout_info, dest_keyring) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_D9AD1FA5307C06CC`](../../library/rules/man-d9ad1fa5307c06cc.yaml) | No matching key was found | 调用 request_key(type, description, callout_info, dest_keyring) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOKEY |
| [`MAN_EC12D1A6FD24AF6F`](../../library/rules/man-ec12d1a6fd24af6f.yaml) | An expired key was found, but no replacement could be obtained | 调用 request_key(type, description, callout_info, dest_keyring) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EKEYEXPIRED |
| [`MAN_F21C8A2B969A6E31`](../../library/rules/man-f21c8a2b969a6e31.yaml) | The type argument started with a period ( . ) | 调用 request_key(type, description, callout_info, dest_keyring) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EPERM |
| [`MAN_FCE5926029B8D7A0`](../../library/rules/man-fce5926029b8d7a0.yaml) | The key quota for this user would be exceeded by creating this key or linking it to the keyring | 调用 request_key(type, description, callout_info, dest_keyring) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EDQUOT |

共形成 9 条规则：

| 规则 | 条件 | 检查内容 | 预期结果 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |

| [`MAN_5FE9A9C52175DA4B`](../../library/rules/man-5fe9a9c52175da4b.yaml) | The input file was not opened for reading or the output file was not opened for writing | 调用 sendfile(out_fd, in_fd, offset, count) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EBADF |

| [`MAN_8708D0B9241DF0D1`](../../library/rules/man-8708d0b9241df0d1.yaml) | Descriptor is not valid or locked, or an mmap (2)-like operation is not available for in_fd , or count is negative | 调用 sendfile(out_fd, in_fd, offset, count) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_A1576844286DE3E1`](../../library/rules/man-a1576844286de3e1.yaml) | offset is not NULL but the input file is not seekable | 调用 sendfile(out_fd, in_fd, offset, count) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ESPIPE |
| [`MAN_C96C83697AEDFB5C`](../../library/rules/man-c96c83697aedfb5c.yaml) | out_fd has the O_APPEND flag set. This is not currently supported by sendfile () | 调用 sendfile(out_fd, in_fd, offset, count) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_FB0A6B453C2E3A58`](../../library/rules/man-fb0a6b453c2e3a58.yaml) | Bad address | 调用 sendfile(out_fd, in_fd, offset, count) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EFAULT |

| [`MAN_71DA9C510F1A6FF0`](../../library/rules/man-71da9c510f1a6ff0.yaml) | Invalid shmid value, unaligned (i.e., not page-aligned and SHM_RND was not specified) or invalid shmaddr value, or can't attach segment at shmaddr , or... | 调用 shmdt(shmaddr) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_7581E30F4F3FD7F6`](../../library/rules/man-7581e30f4f3fd7f6.yaml) | There is no shared memory segment attached at shmaddr ; or, shmaddr is not aligned on a page boundary | 调用 shmdt(shmaddr) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_D93380A5BCC99CFA`](../../library/rules/man-d93380a5bcc99cfa.yaml) | The calling process does not have the required permissions for the requested attach type, and does not have the CAP_IPC_OWNER capability in the user... | 调用 shmdt(shmaddr) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EACCES |
| [`MAN_E709A8443F71E3F8`](../../library/rules/man-e709a8443f71e3f8.yaml) | Could not allocate memory for the descriptor or for the page tables. shmdt () can fail with one of the following errors: | 调用 shmdt(shmaddr) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOMEM |

共形成 9 条规则：

| 规则 | 条件 | 检查内容 | 预期结果 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`MAN_115E9A54ED8D67E1`](../../library/rules/man-115e9a54ed8d67e1.yaml) | All possible shared memory IDs have been taken ( SHMMNI ), or allocating a segment of the requested size would cause the system to exceed the system-wide... | 调用 shmget(key, size, shmflg) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOSPC |
| [`MAN_26AC18BFE2DCA6FF`](../../library/rules/man-26ac18bfe2dca6ff.yaml) | IPC_CREAT and IPC_EXCL were specified in shmflg , but a shared memory segment already exists for key | 调用 shmget(key, size, shmflg) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EEXIST |
| [`MAN_2C07BF803558EA0E`](../../library/rules/man-2c07bf803558ea0e.yaml) | The SHM_HUGETLB flag was specified, but the caller was not privileged (did not have the CAP_IPC_LOCK capability) and is not a member of the... | 调用 shmget(key, size, shmflg) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EPERM |
| [`MAN_706094938C4326CA`](../../library/rules/man-706094938c4326ca.yaml) | The system-wide limit on the total number of open files has been reached | 调用 shmget(key, size, shmflg) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENFILE |
| [`MAN_8F57FC9DB76DC9F7`](../../library/rules/man-8f57fc9db76dc9f7.yaml) | No segment exists for the given key , and IPC_CREAT was not specified | 调用 shmget(key, size, shmflg) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOENT |
| [`MAN_9CC0EE7106975DEB`](../../library/rules/man-9cc0ee7106975deb.yaml) | No memory could be allocated for segment overhead | 调用 shmget(key, size, shmflg) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOMEM |
| [`MAN_B0CDDE4BB5732341`](../../library/rules/man-b0cdde4bb5732341.yaml) | The user does not have permission to access the shared memory segment, and does not have the CAP_IPC_OWNER capability in the user namespace that governs its... | 调用 shmget(key, size, shmflg) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EACCES |
| [`MAN_ED7D373BBEA8B379`](../../library/rules/man-ed7d373bbea8b379.yaml) | A segment for the given key exists, but size is greater than the size of that segment | 调用 shmget(key, size, shmflg) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_F843131CCA96612C`](../../library/rules/man-f843131cca96612c.yaml) | A new segment was to be created and size is less than SHMMIN or greater than SHMMAX | 调用 shmget(key, size, shmflg) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |

| [`MAN_FCF73BE35CA648BA`](../../library/rules/man-fcf73be35ca648ba.yaml) | ( statfs ()) The file referred to by path does not exist | 调用 statfs(path, buf) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOENT |

| [`MAN_F6725ACD1FA99F07`](../../library/rules/man-f6725acd1fa99f07.yaml) | Reserved flag specified in mask . (Currently, there is one such flag, designated by the constant STATX__RESERVED , with the value 0x80000000U.) | 调用 statx(dirfd, path, flags, mask, statxbuf) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
## `swapoff`

共形成 7 条规则：

| 规则 | 条件 | 检查内容 | 预期结果 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`MAN_05B0FC46D68F4F6D`](../../library/rules/man-05b0fc46d68f4f6d.yaml) | ( swapoff ()) path is not currently a swap area | 调用 swapoff(path) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_3DB41ED8FB708A59--3db41ed8fb70`](../../library/rules/man-3db41ed8fb708a59-3db41ed8fb70.yaml) | The file path exists, but refers neither to a regular file nor to a block device; | 调用 swapoff(path) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EINVAL |
| [`MAN_4E75F47CB7B5A138--4e75f47cb7b5`](../../library/rules/man-4e75f47cb7b5a138-4e75f47cb7b5.yaml) | The file path does not exist | 调用 swapoff(path) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOENT |
| [`MAN_52099F4FAACD68B6--52099f4faacd`](../../library/rules/man-52099f4faacd68b6-52099f4faacd.yaml) | The caller does not have the CAP_SYS_ADMIN capability. Alternatively, the maximum number of swap files are already in use; see NOTES below | 调用 swapoff(path) | 返回 -1，errno 为 EPERM |
| [`MAN_7011B01F7BF45FCE--7011b01f7bf4`](../../library/rules/man-7011b01f7bf45fce-7011b01f7bf4.yaml) | The system-wide limit on the total number of open files has been reached | 调用 swapoff(path) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENFILE |
| [`MAN_84AFF3A4A1AE1FFD--84aff3a4a1ae`](../../library/rules/man-84aff3a4a1ae1ffd-84aff3a4a1ae.yaml) | The syscall completes successfully. | 调用 swapoff(path) | 调用成功，返回 0 |
| [`MAN_972F2545B7976217--972f2545b797`](../../library/rules/man-972f2545b7976217-972f2545b797.yaml) | The system has insufficient memory to start swapping | 调用 swapoff(path) | 返回 -1，errno 为 ENOMEM |
